name: Husband's Delight
recipeIngredient: 24 oz Hunts tomato sauce with onions
-to lower fat content - use low-fat cream cheese
8 oz Thin egg noodles, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef.
2. Add salt, pepper, and sugar to the browned meat.
3. Mix the softened cream cheese with sour cream; set aside.
4. Place half of the cooked egg noodles at the bottom of a 7x12 inch baking dish.
5. Top the noodles with the meat mixture.
6. Spread the sour cream mixture over the meat.
7. Cover with the remaining noodles, using some noodles to cover the top (if there are too many noodles, it may make the dish too dry).
8. Sprinkle Parmesan and sharp cheese on top.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
